name: minitor
description: Local torrent caching + streaming POC for Stremio (a tiny, self-hosted TorBox-style learning project)

scripts.build:sidecar:arm64: npm run bundle && pkg dist/minitor-bundle.cjs --config pkg.config.json --target node22-macos-arm64 --output desktop/src-tauri/binaries/minitor-aarch64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --sign - desktop/src-tauri/binaries/minitor-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:sidecar:x64: npm run bundle && pkg dist/minitor-bundle.cjs --config pkg.config.json --target node22-macos-x64 --output desktop/src-tauri/binaries/minitor-x86_64-apple-darwin && codesign --force --sign - desktop/src-tauri/binaries/minitor-x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:sidecar:win: npm run bundle && pkg dist/minitor-bundle.cjs --config pkg.config.json --target node22-win-x64 --output desktop/src-tauri/binaries/minitor-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
scripts.build:sidecar:linux: npm run bundle && pkg dist/minitor-bundle.cjs --config pkg.config.json --target node22-linux-x64 --output desktop/src-tauri/binaries/minitor-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
